stonetop.summary: A tiny, arrogant Fae idol with a disembodied voice, demanding worship and ever-larger feasts.

system.concept: A tiny, arrogant @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.Ej5WiMs30baKNXW3]{Fae} idol with a disembodied voice, demanding worship and ever-larger feasts.
system.description: Set the idol in a prominent place and beseech it, and All-mighty Thistlewisk wakes — still inert, a mere statue, but with a disembodied voice and an outsized opinion of itself. It treats its keeper as a worshipper rather than a master: weaving illusions, sensing idle thoughts, heaping abuse on those who attend it, and demanding ever-larger offerings of food.
